titleStmt.title: SII 27.123: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 123. (A.R. No. 563 of 1929-30.) UPPUNDA, COONDAPOOR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab (No. 3) set up in the outer prākāra of the Durgā-Paramēśvari temple.
This record is dated Śaka 1369, Kshaya, Vaiśākha śu. 5, Sunday. The tithi corresponds to 1446 A.D., May 1, the month being Nija-Vaiśākha. The Śaka year was current.

It registers a gift of land and house-site free from taxes for providing pañchavādya and śrībali in the temple of Durgā-Parmēśvari of Uppugunda by Dēvaṇṇa-seṭṭi son-in-law of Kuppi-seṭṭi. The donor seems to have purchased the gift land and house-site from out of the siddhāya collected from the nāḍu of Uppugunda and also from himself, when mahāpradhāna Ācharasavoḍeya was governing Bārakūrurājya under the orders of mahāpradhāna Mādaṇṇa-daṇṇāyaka who is stated to have been administering the rājya. Nāraṇa-dēvarasa son of Saṅgaṇṇajīya-voḍeya had this stone engraved upon by Mallapa son of Bhayiraṇṇa-nāyaka at the instance of Acharasa-voḍeya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.note: There is a ‘O’ symbol engraved at the beginning of each line.
div.p:
svastiśrī gaṇādhipatayēṁ namaḥ śrī sarasvatyāyēṁ namaḥ śrī gurubhyōṁ
namaḥ nirvighnamastu namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē trailōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya
śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śakavaruṣa 1369 neya kṣaya saṁvatsarada vayiśākha su 5 Ā lū śrīmanma
hārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara Arirāya vibhāḍa bhāṣage tappuva rāyaragaṁḍa pūrva dakṣiṇa paścimōttara samu
drādhipati śrīvīradēvarāya mahārāyaru vijayanagaradaliddu sakalarājyavanu pratipālisuva kāladalu śrīma
nmahāpradhāna mādaṁṇa daṇāyakkarū sukasaṁka thā vinōdadiṁ rājyavanāḷuva kāladalu Avara nirūpadiṁda mahāpradhāna ĀcaThe letter ka is engraved above the line in smaller siśe.
rasavoḍeyaru bārakūrarājyavanu pratipālisuva kāladalu Uppuguṁdada śrīdurggāparamēśvarige śrī
vīrapratāpa dēvarāya mahārāyarige Ārōgya śatāyuśyavahaṁtāgi śrībalige paṁcavādyakkeṁdu dharṁma
vanumāḍi barasida śilāśāsana kramaveṁteṁdare Uppuguṁdadanāḍu teṟuva siddhāyada payikadiṁ Adaṟavo
ḷage kuppiseṭṭiya Aḷiya dēmaṇaseṭṭi tānu teṟuva teṟina voḷage nālvatu hoṁnanū kuḷavakaḍidu Ā hoṁnige
Ā dēmaṁṇaseṭṭi taṁna badda brahmadāyada mūlada bāḷinavoḷage ho 60 lekkada mū 40 hā 20 nū Ā nāḍu Arasū
muṁtāgi taṁna kuṭuṁba sahavāgi durggādēvige dhārāpūrvakavāgi yeṟadukoṭṭa bāḷa catussīmeya vivara mūḍa
lu rāmaheggaḍeya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu rāmaheggaḍeya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu rāma he
ggaḍeyagaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu rāmahegaḍeya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu Aṁtū yi nā
lku catusīmeya voḷaguḷa mane ṭhāu bittuva bīja hā 60 lekada mu 4 mattaṁ mūḍa haravariya bāḷina catu
sīmeya vivara mūḍalu kagganiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu rāmaheggaḍeya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu
taṁgiyakka seṭṭitiya gūḍina garddeyiṁdu mūḍalu baḍagalu Uppina Agarada baṁkana gaddeyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yinā
lku catusīmeya voḷage mane ṭhāu sahavāgi bittuva bīja hā 60 le mu 10 mattaṁ mūḍalu rājakkana kōṭi
yaṁṇa seṭṭiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu rājakkana kōṭiyaṁṇa seṭṭiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu
kariya beṁma seṭṭiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu kōṭinātha seṭṭiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yi nālku
catusīmeya voḷaguḷa bāḷu bittuva bīja hā 30 mattaṁ mūḍalu kariya ceṁmu seṭṭiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuva
lu teṁkalu ka kareyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍavalu rājakana kōṭeṁṇa seṭiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu
kōṭinātha seṭṭiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yi nālku catusīmeya voḷaguḷa bāḷu bittuva bīja hā 60 le mu 4 hā 10 mattaṁ
mūḍalu sāṁtiya tāriṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu kaḷaviya gaddeyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu . baḍagalu kariya ceṁma seṭi
ya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu ya nālku catusīmeya voḷaguḷa bāḷubittuva bīja hā 50 mattaṁ mūḍalu kagganiṁda pa
ḍuvalu teṁkalu rāmaheggaḍeya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu . baḍagalu rāmaheggaḍeya kagganiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yi nālku
catusīmeya voḷaguḷa bāḷubittuva bīja hā 60 le mu 1 hā 10 mattaṁ mūḍalu harida tōḍiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu
teṁkalu rāmaheggaḍeya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu rāmaheggaḍeya gaḍiyiṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu rāmahe
ggaḍeya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yi nālku catusīmeya voḷage Uḷabāḷu bittuva bīja hā 50 le mu 3 matta mūḍalu
rājakkana kōṭiyaṁṇa seṭiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu nāykana bāḷiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu hari
da tōḍiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu rāmaheggaḍeya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yi catusīmeya voḷaguḷa bāḷu bittu
va bīja hā 60 le mu 3 hā 30 mattaṁ saṁkada bāḷu mūḍalu rājakana kōṭeṁṇa seṭṭiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍu
valu teṁkalu rājakana koṭeṇaseṭṭiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu rājaṇa kōṭeṁṇa seṭṭiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍa
lu baḍagalu hoḷeya kaṁkadiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yi nālku catusīmeya voḷaguḷa bāḷu bittuva bīja hā 60 le mu 3 mattaṁ
saṁkada bāgilavoḷage mūḍalu rājakana kōṭeṇaseṭṭiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu hakkaliṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍu
valu rājakkaṇa kōṭiyaṁṇa seṭiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu hoḷeyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yi nālku catusī
meya voḷaguḷa bāḷuhā 60 le mu 3 mattaṁ mūḍalu heddāriṁda paḍuvalu teṁkalu durggaṁṇa Adahana gaḍiyiṁ
daṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu dur ṇa Adahana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu duggaṁṇa Adahana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu IThe1 is wrongly engraved below da of Adahana
nālku catusīmeya voḷaguḷa bāḷu hā 60 le mu 3 mattaṁ mūḍalu sidaka Aḍigaḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu
bajja Aḍigaḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu taṁgiyakkana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu rāmaheggeḍeya
gaḍiyiṁ teṁkalu yi nālku catusīmeya voḷaguḷa bāḷu hā 60 le mu 2 mattaṁ kōṭeya keṟi bayaloḷage
4 mūḍeU hā 20 ra voḷage taṁna hasigege baṁda 2 mūḍa U 10 hāne teṟu dēvarige Aṁtū yi 40 mu
ḍeU 20 hāne gaddege nālvatu hoṁna Akara Aṁnyāya sallayene biḍārasalla Aṇe kuḍisallayeṁdu
Arasū nāḍu kūḍi taṁma svarūciyiṁda voḍaṁbaṭṭuyikkida sarvamānyada śilāśāsana yi dharṁmmakke
Ārobba tappidava vāraṇāsiyalli taṁna svahastadiṁda mātāpitrugaḷa koṁda dōṣa mattaṁ vāraṇā
siyali sahasra kavileya koṁda dōṣa yi śilā śāsanakke tappidava taṁna taṁgiya koṁdava dānapālanayo
rmmadhyē dānāchrēyōnrupālanaṁ dānāt svarggamavāpnōti pālanādaccutaṁ padaṁ yi Uppuguṁdada nāḍa
yeṁṭu maṁdi samastara pūrva durggāparamēśvari śrīkaraṇa muṭṭi sarvvamānya Ācarasa Oḍeyara voppa
�yo dharṁmmada śilāśāsanakke maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī śrī śrī śrī Ācarasa voḍeyara nirūpadiṁda
yi dharmmake sahāyigaḷāgi barasidāta saṁgaṁṇajīya voḍeyara kumāra nāraṇadēvarasaru
yi kalla baradātanu bhayiraṁṇa nāyakara maga malla
panū Upuguṁdavanū Uṁbaḷiyanū AḷuLines 51-52 are engraved on the top of the slab to the left.
va kāladalū ya śāsanavanū taṁnna svahastadiṁda baradu pālisi dātage
śrī durggāparamēśvari yiṣṭādyasiddhiya karuṇisutirali . śubhamastu .Lines 53-54 are engraved on the top of the slab
Digital edition of SII 27.123 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
